name: Kabuki Market
description: Fast travel terminal near the bustling Kabuki open-air market.
tips: Central hub for Watson side jobs.

name: Megabuilding H10
description: Fast travel point at V's home megabuilding in Little China.
tips: V's apartment is on the upper floors.

name: Arasaka Tower
description: Fast travel terminal at the imposing Arasaka corporate headquarters.
tips: Heavily guarded area with high-level enemies.

name: Reconciliation Park
description: Fast travel point at the memorial park in the heart of the city.
tips: Site of the 2023 nuke memorial. Tarot card nearby.

name: Corpo Plaza
description: Fast travel terminal in Night City's corporate district.
tips: Expensive shops and high security throughout.

name: Japantown
description: Fast travel point in the neon-lit streets of Japantown.
tips: Many gigs and side jobs available in this area.

name: Cherry Blossom Market
description: Fast travel terminal near the Cherry Blossom Market in Japantown.
tips: Ripperdoc Fingers operates nearby.

name: Afterlife
description: Fast travel point outside the legendary merc bar, the Afterlife.
tips: Rogue and other fixers hang out here.

name: The Glen
description: Fast travel terminal in the residential area of The Glen.
tips: Heywood apartment available for purchase nearby.

name: Vista del Rey
description: Fast travel point in the winding streets of Vista del Rey.
tips: Valentinos gang territory — stay alert.

name: Rancho Coronado
description: Fast travel terminal in the industrial Rancho Coronado area.
tips: 6th Street gang dominates this district.

name: West Wind Estate
description: Fast travel point in the abandoned West Wind Estate housing project.
tips: Voodoo Boys territory — netrunners beware.

name: Coastview
description: Fast travel terminal near the derelict Coastview boardwalk.
tips: Grand Imperial Mall and roller coaster are nearby.

name: Arroyo
description: Fast travel point in the factory district of Arroyo.
tips: Many NCPD scanner hustles in the area.

name: Northside
description: Fast travel terminal in the industrial Northside district.
tips: Maelstrom gang hideouts throughout the area.

name: Bradbury & Buran
description: Fast travel point at the Bradbury & Buran intersection.
tips: Multiple vendor stalls nearby.

name: Kabuki Roundabout
description: Fast travel terminal at the busy Kabuki roundabout.
tips: Good central location for Kabuki exploration.

name: MLK & Brandon
description: Fast travel point at the MLK & Brandon crossroads.
tips: Near several Valentinos gig locations.

name: Red Peaks
description: Fast travel terminal on the outskirts near the Red Peaks area.
tips: Nomad camps and Aldecaldos nearby.

name: Stadium Love
description: Fast travel point near the old stadium in Arroyo.
tips: 6th Street fight club operates nearby.

name: Dogtown Gate
description: Fast travel terminal at the main gate into Dogtown.
tips: Kurt Hansen's territory — bring your best gear.

name: Republic East
description: Fast travel point at Republic East in Wellsprings.
tips: Mixed residential and commercial zone.

name: Longshore Stacks
description: Fast travel terminal at the Longshore Stacks shipping yard.
tips: Container yards with scattered loot.

name: College St
description: Fast travel point on College Street in Charter Hill.
tips: Upscale neighborhood with wealthy residents.

name: Metro: Ministry
description: Fast travel terminal at the Metro Ministry station downtown.
tips: NCART metro station with quick access to City Center.

name: Ebunike
description: Fast travel point near the Ebunike cargo ship at the docks.
tips: Site of the Maelstrom deal during The Pickup.

name: Charter Hill
description: Fast travel terminal in the affluent Charter Hill neighborhood.
tips: Kerry Eurodyne's mansion is in this area.

name: Dark Matter
description: Fast travel point near the Dark Matter nightclub.
tips: Popular nightlife spot in Japantown.

name: Wellsprings
description: Fast travel terminal in the Wellsprings neighborhood.
tips: Judy's apartment is in this area.

name: Downtown
description: Fast travel point in the heart of downtown Night City.
tips: Luxury shops and corporate offices throughout.

name: Viktor Vektor
description: V's trusted ripperdoc, operating from a basement clinic in Little China.
tips: Offers a discount on your first Kiroshi optics. Best ripperdoc in Watson.

name: Fingers
description: A sleazy ripperdoc in Japantown with unique cyberware stock.
tips: Has exclusive cyberware. Be careful — punching him locks you out of his shop.

name: Cassius Ryder
description: Ripperdoc operating in Northside Industrial District.
tips: Sells some unique Northside-exclusive mods.

name: Doc Badlands
description: A nomad-friendly ripperdoc operating out in the Badlands.
tips: Only ripperdoc accessible in the Badlands area.

name: Robert
description: An upscale ripperdoc serving Charter Hill's wealthy clientele.
tips: Carries high-end cyberware for the discerning customer.

name: Buck
description: A reliable ripperdoc working in the Kabuki district.
tips: Affordable prices and decent selection.

name: Octavio
description: Ripperdoc operating in the Rancho Coronado industrial zone.
tips: Good stock of combat-oriented cyberware.

name: Nina Kraviz
description: A skilled ripperdoc in Watson's Little China neighborhood.
tips: Specializes in neural cyberware modifications.

name: Charles
description: High-end ripperdoc catering to Westbrook's elite clientele.
tips: Premium cyberware at premium prices.

name: Kraviz
description: A ripperdoc operating in the dangerous Dogtown district.
tips: Carries exclusive Dogtown cyberware not found elsewhere.

name: Ripperdoc - The Glen
description: A ripperdoc clinic in The Glen, Heywood.
tips: Convenient location for Heywood operations.

name: Ripperdoc - Pacifica
description: One of the few ripperdocs brave enough to operate in Pacifica.
tips: Limited stock but sometimes has rare finds.

name: Skippy
description: A smart pistol with an AI personality found in an alley in Vista del Rey.
tips: Choose Stone Cold Killer mode — it switches after 50 kills regardless.

name: Lizzie
description: Iconic tech pistol found in the basement of Lizzie's Bar.
tips: Charges faster than standard tech pistols. Found during Automatic Love.

name: Widow Maker
description: Iconic tech precision rifle taken from Nash during Ghost Town.
tips: Fires two projectiles per shot when fully charged.

name: Overwatch
description: Iconic power sniper rifle gifted by Panam Palmer.
tips: Silenced sniper rifle — complete Riders on the Storm to receive it.

name: Comrade's Hammer
description: Iconic tech revolver with devastating single-shot damage.
tips: Only holds one round but deals massive damage. Found during a Militech convoy gig.

name: Malorian Arms 3516
description: Johnny Silverhand's legendary pistol.
tips: Obtained during the Chippin' In questline. One of the best pistols in the game.

name: Kongou
description: Iconic smart pistol from Yorinobu Arasaka's suite at Konpeki Plaza.
tips: Grab it during The Heist — you can't return later.

name: Plan B
description: Dex DeShawn's iconic pistol with a golden finish.
tips: Found on Dex's body during the story. Electrifying rounds.

name: Dying Night
description: Iconic power pistol sold by Wilson at his gun shop in Megabuilding H10.
tips: Available after completing The Ride. Increased headshot damage.

name: Buzzsaw
description: Iconic submachine gun with penetrating rounds.
tips: Dropped by Razor Hugh during Beat on the Brat questline.

name: Breakthrough
description: Iconic tech sniper rifle that can be crafted with the right specs.
tips: Requires Technical Ability 18 to craft. Charges faster than standard snipers.

name: Divided We Stand
description: Iconic smart assault rifle won from a shooting competition at Stadium Love.
tips: Win the 6th Street shooting competition to obtain this weapon.

name: Genjiroh
description: Iconic smart pistol found during the Arasaka Tower assault.
tips: Found during the final mission. Fires four rounds per shot.

name: Headhunter
description: Iconic knife that marks enemies for increased headshot damage.
tips: Obtained during a Badlands side quest. Great for stealth builds.

name: Sir John Phallustiff
description: A novelty iconic melee weapon found at Fingers' clinic.
tips: Found in a secret room at Fingers' ripperdoc clinic in Japantown.

name: Scalpel
description: Iconic katana obtained from Sasquatch during I Walk the Line.
tips: Applies bleeding and deals electrical damage while Sandevistan is active.

name: Fenrir
description: Iconic power submachine gun that applies burn to enemies.
tips: Obtained during a quest in Northside. Reduced reload time with burning effect.

name: Ba Xing Chong
description: Iconic smart shotgun obtained from Adam Smasher.
tips: Loot from Adam Smasher during the final mission. Explosive smart rounds.

name: Psalm 11:6
description: Iconic power assault rifle associated with the 6th Street gang.
tips: Obtained from a 6th Street gang leader. Incendiary rounds.

name: Moron Labe
description: Iconic power assault rifle with ricochet capabilities.
tips: Quest reward from a Watson side job. Increased ricochet damage.

name: Amnesty
description: Iconic power revolver that can be crafted.
tips: Requires crafting specs found in Heywood. High critical chance.

name: Prejudice
description: Iconic power assault rifle from the Albert quest.
tips: Complete the quest to receive this weapon. High rate of fire.

name: Chaos
description: Iconic tech pistol dropped by Royce during The Pickup.
tips: Random damage type on each shot — can be lethal or non-lethal.

name: Doom Doom
description: Iconic power revolver dropped by Dum Dum.
tips: Four rounds per shot. Encounter Dum Dum during Second Conflict.

name: Cottonmouth
description: Iconic melee weapon obtained from Fingers during a quest.
tips: Non-lethal baton that applies poison. Found during a Fingers questline.

name: Phantom of Night City
description: Cyberpsycho sighting — a stealthy psycho stalking The Glen at night.
tips: Uses optical camo. Bring a short-circuit quickhack to disable stealth.

name: Bloody Ritual
description: Cyberpsycho sighting near a gruesome ritual scene in Kabuki.
tips: Multiple bodies at the scene. Psycho uses melee attacks.

name: Ticket to the Major Leagues
description: Cyberpsycho sighting involving an aspiring merc gone haywire.
tips: Found in an alley in Little China. Watch for grenade spam.

name: Where the Bodies Hit the Floor
description: Cyberpsycho sighting in a factory in Arroyo.
tips: Heavy-armored psycho. Use tech weapons to penetrate cover.

name: Seaside Cafe
description: Cyberpsycho sighting at a seaside cafe on the Pacifica boardwalk.
tips: Psycho is a netrunner — bring quickhack resistance.

name: Letter of the Law
description: Cyberpsycho sighting involving a former corpo security officer.
tips: Found downtown. Uses smart weapons — stay behind cover.

name: Smoke on the Water
description: Cyberpsycho sighting in the Charter Hill waterfront area.
tips: Psycho uses chemical weapons. Bring chem-resistant gear.

name: Second Chances
description: Cyberpsycho sighting near a clinic in Wellsprings, Heywood.
tips: Former patient gone berserk. Non-lethal approach recommended by Regina.

name: Discount Doc
description: Cyberpsycho sighting near a discount ripperdoc in Kabuki.
tips: Patient with botched cyberware. Careful of AOE attacks.

name: House on a Hill
description: Cyberpsycho sighting at a mansion in North Oak.
tips: Wealthy district psycho. Uses top-tier cyberware in combat.

name: Six Feet Under
description: Cyberpsycho sighting in a cemetery area in Vista del Rey.
tips: Underground area. Bring a flashlight attachment.

name: Lt. Mower
description: Cyberpsycho sighting — a former military lieutenant in Rancho Coronado.
tips: Heavy weapons specialist. Keep your distance and use cover.

name: Lex Talionis
description: Cyberpsycho sighting in the Northside Industrial district.
tips: Revenge-driven psycho. Scan the area for context clues.

name: Under the Bridge
description: Cyberpsycho sighting beneath a highway overpass in The Glen.
tips: Homeless camp area. Psycho is fast — use crowd control.

name: Demons of War
description: Cyberpsycho sighting — a war veteran in the Badlands.
tips: Former soldier with military-grade cyberware. Very dangerous at range.

name: On Deaf Ears
description: Cyberpsycho sighting in the West Wind Estate housing blocks.
tips: Sonic-based attacks. Equip audio-dampening cyberware if available.

name: Flame Dell
description: Cyberpsycho sighting near a park in Wellsprings.
tips: Uses incendiary weapons. Bring fire-resistant clothing.

name: The Fool
description: Tarot graffiti of The Fool near V's apartment in Megabuilding H10.
tips: On the wall outside V's apartment complex. Hard to miss.

name: The Magician
description: Tarot graffiti of The Magician on a wall in Kabuki.
tips: Look on the side of a building near the Kabuki Market.

name: The High Priestess
description: Tarot graffiti of The High Priestess near Cherry Blossom Market.
tips: On a wall facing the market entrance in Japantown.

name: The Empress
description: Tarot graffiti of The Empress on a building wall in Japantown.
tips: Near the Japantown fast travel point on a side alley wall.

name: The Emperor
description: Tarot graffiti of The Emperor near Corpo Plaza.
tips: On a pillar near the Corpo Plaza fast travel terminal.

name: The Hierophant
description: Tarot graffiti of The Hierophant on a church wall in Heywood.
tips: Look near the church building in The Glen.

name: The Lovers
description: Tarot graffiti of The Lovers in Westbrook's Charter Hill.
tips: On an apartment building wall near the Charter Hill FT.

name: The Chariot
description: Tarot graffiti of The Chariot on a warehouse wall in Watson.
tips: In the Northside Industrial area, on a large warehouse.

name: Strength
description: Tarot graffiti of Strength in the Northside district.
tips: On the side of an industrial building near the docks.

name: The Hermit
description: Tarot graffiti of The Hermit on a structure in the Badlands.
tips: On a lonely structure out in the desert. Easy to miss.

name: Wheel of Fortune
description: Tarot graffiti of the Wheel of Fortune in Pacifica.
tips: On a building wall in the West Wind Estate housing project.

name: Justice
description: Tarot graffiti of Justice on a wall in The Glen.
tips: Near a courthouse-like building in the Glen area.

name: The Hanged Man
description: Tarot graffiti of The Hanged Man in Vista del Rey.
tips: On a wall in a narrow alley in Vista del Rey.

name: Death
description: Tarot graffiti of Death on a wall in Rancho Coronado.
tips: Near an abandoned building in the industrial area.

name: Temperance
description: Tarot graffiti of Temperance on a factory wall in Arroyo.
tips: On the side of a factory building in Arroyo district.

name: The Devil
description: Tarot graffiti of The Devil near Arasaka Tower.
tips: On a wall in the shadow of Arasaka Tower.

name: The Tower
description: Tarot graffiti of The Tower in the City Center downtown area.
tips: On a skyscraper wall in the downtown district.

name: The Star
description: Tarot graffiti of The Star in Santo Domingo.
tips: On a wall in the Arroyo district near a park.

name: The Moon
description: Tarot graffiti of The Moon near the Coastview boardwalk.
tips: On a wall near the abandoned Grand Imperial Mall.

name: The Sun
description: Tarot graffiti of The Sun in the wealthy North Oak area.
tips: On a hillside wall in the most exclusive neighborhood.

name: The World
description: Tarot graffiti of The World at Reconciliation Park.
tips: Found at the memorial park. The last tarot card to collect.

name: Many Ways to Skin a Cat
description: Regina Jones gig — eliminate a target in the Kabuki area.
tips: Target is in a guarded building. Stealth approach recommended.

name: Backs Against the Wall
description: Regina Jones gig — a desperate situation in Little China needs a merc.
tips: Multiple enemies inside. Scan for cameras before entering.

name: Dirty Biz
description: Regina Jones gig — recover a braindance recording with disturbing content.
tips: Involves a dark BD storyline. Loot the area thoroughly.

name: Automatic Love
description: Main job — visit Clouds in Japantown to find Evelyn Parker.
tips: Dialogue choices here affect later questlines significantly.

name: Disasterpiece
description: Main job — track down the XBD studio in Northside with Judy.
tips: Follow Judy's lead. Combat-heavy mission in a Scav hideout.

name: The Heist
description: Main job — infiltrate Konpeki Plaza to steal the Relic.
tips: Point of no return for Act 1. Grab Kongou pistol from Yorinobu's room.

name: Playing for Time
description: Main job — deal with the aftermath of The Heist at V's apartment.
tips: Triggers Act 2 of the main story.

name: I Fought the Law
description: Side job — investigate the suspicious death of the mayor's son.
tips: Leads to a deep conspiracy. Talk to River Ward at the NCPD precinct.

name: Heroes
description: Side job — pay tribute to Jackie's memory at El Coyote Cojo.
tips: Attend Jackie's ofrenda. Emotional quest with Mama Welles.

name: Chippin' In
description: Side job — help Johnny Silverhand settle old scores.
tips: Leads to obtaining the Malorian Arms 3516 and Porsche 911.

name: Riders on the Storm
description: Side job — rescue Saul from Wraith captivity with Panam.
tips: Stealth or guns blazing. Rewards Overwatch sniper rifle.

name: Sinnerman
description: Side job — a bizarre spiritual journey with a death row inmate.
tips: One of the most unique quests. Choices lead to very different outcomes.

name: Dream On
description: Side job — investigate strange occurrences for Jefferson Peralez.
tips: Deep conspiracy quest. Pay attention to the clues in the apartment.

name: The Hunt
description: Side job — help River Ward track down a kidnapper.
tips: BD sequence is a puzzle — look for barn clues. Time-sensitive ending.

name: Following the River
description: Side job — reconnect with River Ward for a romantic dinner.
tips: Romance option with River. Bring your best outfit.

name: Pyramid Song
description: Side job — explore a submerged town with Judy Alvarez.
tips: Diving sequence. Romance option with Judy if you made the right choices.

name: Blistering Love
description: Side job — attend a party with Panam and the Aldecaldos.
tips: Romance option with Panam. Important choices for the ending.

name: Rebel Rebel
description: Side job — help Kerry Eurodyne deal with a copycat band.
tips: Fun quest with Kerry at a luxury yacht. Romance option available.

name: Burning Desire
description: Side job — help a man whose nether regions are on fire. Literally.
tips: Quick and humorous quest. Bring a fire extinguisher (just kidding).

name: Psychofan
description: Gig — steal Johnny Silverhand memorabilia from an obsessive fan.
tips: Use stealth to avoid alerting the building's residents.

name: Kabuki Back Alley Shootout
description: NCPD scanner — gang members engaged in a shootout in Kabuki.
tips: Tyger Claws fighting over turf. Grab loot from the bodies.

name: Northside Warehouse Raid
description: NCPD scanner — assault in progress at a Northside warehouse.
tips: Maelstrom are attacking a warehouse. High-tech loot inside.

name: Little China Street Crime
description: NCPD scanner — reported crime scene in Little China.
tips: Investigate the crime scene and neutralize perpetrators.

name: Tyger Claw Hideout
description: NCPD scanner — organized crime activity in a Tyger Claw den.
tips: Well-guarded location. Disable the turrets first.

name: Hidden Stash - Watson Rooftop
description: NCPD scanner — hidden cache on a Watson rooftop.
tips: Use double jump to reach. Contains rare crafting components.

name: Corpo Plaza Disturbance
description: NCPD scanner — violent incident near Corpo Plaza.
tips: High-security area. NCPD MaxTac may intervene if things escalate.

name: Downtown Mugging
description: NCPD scanner — reported mugging in the downtown area.
tips: Quick encounter. Help the victim for a small reward.

name: Corporate Espionage Ring
description: NCPD scanner — bust a corporate espionage ring downtown.
tips: Multiple enemies with high-end gear. Worth the loot.

name: Japantown Alley Brawl
description: NCPD scanner — gang brawl in a Japantown alley.
tips: Tyger Claws vs Animals. Let them weaken each other first.

name: Charter Hill Home Invasion
description: NCPD scanner — home invasion reported in Charter Hill.
tips: Wealthy district break-in. Neutralize the intruders quickly.

name: North Oak Hidden Cache
description: NCPD scanner — hidden stash in the North Oak hillside.
tips: Behind a locked gate. Requires Technical Ability 10.

name: Glen Parking Garage Fight
description: NCPD scanner — violent confrontation in a Glen parking garage.
tips: Multiple Valentinos. Use the car columns as cover.

name: Vista del Rey Street Violence
description: NCPD scanner — armed gang members on Vista del Rey streets.
tips: Valentinos patrolling the area. Watch for reinforcements.

name: Wellsprings Drug Lab
description: NCPD scanner — illegal drug lab discovered in Wellsprings.
tips: Chemical hazards inside. Grab the evidence and crafting materials.

name: Valentinos Weapons Cache
description: NCPD scanner — Valentinos weapons stash in Vista del Rey.
tips: Heavily guarded. Great source of weapon mods.

name: Hidden Stash - Heywood Underpass
description: NCPD scanner — hidden cache under a Heywood overpass.
tips: Look behind the concrete barricade. Rare item inside.

name: West Wind Housing Conflict
description: NCPD scanner — violent conflict in the West Wind housing blocks.
tips: Voodoo Boys vs Animals. Dangerous netrunner enemies.

name: Coastview Boardwalk Robbery
description: NCPD scanner — robbery near the Coastview boardwalk.
tips: Scavengers targeting tourists. Quick neutralization.

name: Animal Gym Shakedown
description: NCPD scanner — Animals gang running a protection racket.
tips: Brawler enemies. Melee weapons or shotguns work well here.

name: Arroyo Factory Floor Fight
description: NCPD scanner — shootout on an Arroyo factory floor.
tips: 6th Street gang members. Open area with minimal cover.

name: Rancho Coronado Ambush
description: NCPD scanner — ambush in Rancho Coronado streets.
tips: Gang checkpoint ambush. Approach with caution.

name: Santo Domingo Chop Shop
description: NCPD scanner — illegal vehicle chop shop in Arroyo.
tips: Stolen car parts inside. Moderate resistance from mechanics.

name: 6th Street Arms Deal
description: NCPD scanner — 6th Street gang arms deal in Rancho Coronado.
tips: Interrupt the deal for a large weapon haul.

name: Hidden Stash - Santo Domingo Roof
description: NCPD scanner — hidden cache on a Santo Domingo rooftop.
tips: Access via fire escape. Contains legendary crafting spec.

name: Nomad Camp Raid
description: NCPD scanner — Wraiths raiding a nomad camp in the Badlands.
tips: Help the nomads or loot both sides. Remote location.

name: Rayfield Caliburn
description: Free iconic hypercar found in a hidden cave tunnel in the Badlands.
tips: Complete Panam's Ghost Town quest first. In a tunnel near the Aldecaldos camp.

name: Rayfield Aerondight
description: The most expensive car in Night City — a luxury Rayfield.
tips: Costs around 225,000 eddies. Available from a fixer after Street Cred 50.

name: Quadra Type-66
description: A muscle car classic — the Quadra Type-66 Avenger.
tips: Multiple variants available. This one costs around 55,000 eddies.

name: Thorton Colby CX410 Butte
description: A rugged pickup truck, perfect for Badlands excursions.
tips: Affordable at around 29,000 eddies. Good all-terrain performance.

name: Arch Nazare
description: A sleek sport motorcycle designed by Keanu Reeves' company.
tips: One of the fastest bikes in Night City. Costs around 138,000 eddies.

name: Porsche 911 II (930) Turbo
description: Johnny Silverhand's classic Porsche 911, a true Night City legend.
tips: Obtained free during the Chippin' In questline. Keep it — don't give it back.

name: Makigai MaiMai P126
description: The cheapest car in Night City — a tiny city runabout.
tips: Only 14,000 eddies. Hilariously small but gets the job done.

name: Mizutani Shion Coyote
description: A nomad-modified sports car built for the desert.
tips: Great off-road capability. Costs around 115,000 eddies.

name: Villefort Alvarado
description: A Valentinos-style luxury lowrider.
tips: Stylish ride for cruising Heywood. Around 62,000 eddies.

name: Brennan Apollo
description: A compact and agile motorcycle for city navigation.
tips: Budget-friendly bike at around 24,000 eddies. Great for tight streets.

name: V's Megabuilding H10 Apartment
description: V's starting apartment in Megabuilding H10, Little China.
tips: Stash weapons, change clothes, sleep to skip time. Free from the start.

name: The Glen Apartment
description: A purchasable apartment in The Glen, Heywood.
tips: Costs 40,000 eddies. Convenient location for Heywood gigs.

name: Japantown Apartment
description: A purchasable apartment in the heart of Japantown.
tips: Costs 55,000 eddies. Close to Clouds and Japantown nightlife.

name: Northside Apartment
description: A purchasable apartment in the Northside Industrial district.
tips: Costs 20,000 eddies. Budget option in Watson.

name: Dogtown Safehouse
description: V's safehouse in the Dogtown district, available in Phantom Liberty.
tips: Unlocked during the Phantom Liberty storyline. Free stash point.

name: Kabuki Noodle Stand
description: A noodle stand in Kabuki serving hot bowls of ramen.
tips: Cheap food for health regeneration. Try the real water noodles.

name: Corpo Plaza Food Court
description: An upscale food court in the Corpo Plaza area.
tips: Overpriced but convenient. Multiple food options available.

name: Japantown Street Food
description: Street food vendor serving Japanese-inspired Night City cuisine.
tips: Good variety of food items. Popular with locals.

name: El Coyote Cojo
description: Mama Welles' bar and restaurant in The Glen. Jackie's family business.
tips: Story-important location. Great atmosphere and cheap drinks.

name: Pacifica Beachside Grill
description: A surviving food vendor on the Pacifica boardwalk.
tips: One of the few food sources in Pacifica. Limited selection.

name: Wilson's 2nd Amendment
description: Wilson's gun shop in Megabuilding H10. V's go-to weapons dealer.
tips: Sells the Dying Night iconic pistol after The Ride quest.

name: Downtown Arms Dealer
description: High-end weapons dealer in the downtown City Center area.
tips: Expensive but carries top-tier weapons and mods.

name: Heywood Firearms
description: Weapons shop in Vista del Rey with Valentinos-style inventory.
tips: Good selection of power weapons and melee gear.

name: Rancho Coronado Arms
description: Weapons dealer in the Rancho Coronado district.
tips: Stocks military surplus weapons. Good prices on assault rifles.

name: Pacifica Weapons Vendor
description: An underground weapons dealer in Pacifica.
tips: Limited stock but occasionally has rare finds.

name: Kabuki Fashion
description: Clothing store in Kabuki offering streetwear and casual outfits.
tips: Affordable Watson district fashion. Good for early game.

name: Jinguji
description: High-end fashion boutique in downtown Night City.
tips: Most expensive clothing store. Top-tier armor values.

name: Japantown Threads
description: Trendy clothing store in Japantown with Asian-inspired designs.
tips: Unique Japantown fashion not found elsewhere.

name: The Glen Outfitters
description: Clothing store in The Glen with Heywood street fashion.
tips: Valentinos-inspired fashion. Good armor mods.

name: Santo Domingo Surplus
description: Military surplus clothing store in Arroyo.
tips: Practical clothing with high armor values. No frills.

name: Kabuki Netrunner Shop
description: A netrunner supply shop hidden in the Kabuki back streets.
tips: Sells quickhacks, cyberdecks, and components. Good early-game stock.

name: Downtown Netrunner Supplies
description: Upscale netrunner shop in downtown City Center.
tips: Premium cyberdecks and legendary quickhack components.

name: Pacifica Net Shop
description: Voodoo Boys-affiliated netrunner shop in Pacifica.
tips: Unique Pacifica quickhacks. Some of the best netrunner gear in the city.

name: Kabuki Melee Vendor
description: A melee weapons specialist in Kabuki selling katanas and knives.
tips: Great selection of Tyger Claw-style katanas.

name: Japantown Blade Smith
description: Traditional blade shop in Japantown with high-quality melee weapons.
tips: Best katana selection in Night City. Also sells mantis blade upgrades.

name: Heywood Melee Arsenal
description: Melee weapons shop in Vista del Rey featuring machetes and bats.
tips: Valentinos-style melee weapons. Good damage at fair prices.

name: Watson Medpoint
description: Medical supply vendor in Little China, Watson.
tips: Sells MaxDoc, Bounce Back, and other healing consumables.

name: City Center Medpoint
description: Medical supplies available near Corpo Plaza.
tips: Higher-tier healing items available here.

name: Heywood Medpoint
description: Medical supply vendor in The Glen, Heywood.
tips: Stock up before Heywood gigs.

name: Drop Point - Kabuki
description: Drop point terminal in Kabuki for selling unwanted gear.
tips: Sell junk and duplicate weapons here for quick eddies.

name: Drop Point - Little China
description: Drop point terminal near Megabuilding H10.
tips: Convenient for clearing inventory after missions.

name: Drop Point - Corpo Plaza
description: Drop point terminal in the Corpo Plaza area.
tips: Sell high-value corporate loot here.

name: Drop Point - Japantown
description: Drop point terminal in Japantown.
tips: Useful after completing Westbrook gigs.

name: Drop Point - The Glen
description: Drop point terminal in The Glen, Heywood.
tips: Central Heywood drop-off point.

name: Drop Point - Pacifica
description: Drop point terminal in the West Wind Estate.
tips: One of the few drop points in Pacifica.

name: Drop Point - Arroyo
description: Drop point terminal in the Arroyo district.
tips: Sell factory loot from nearby NCPD hustles.

name: Joytoy - Japantown
description: Joytoy service provider in the Japantown nightlife area.
tips: Available in the Jig-Jig Street red-light district.

name: Joytoy - Jig-Jig Street
description: Another joytoy service provider on Jig-Jig Street.
tips: Multiple options available on Jig-Jig Street in Japantown.

name: Dogtown Black Market Arms
description: Black market weapons dealer in Dogtown.
tips: Phantom Liberty exclusive weapons. High prices but unique stock.

name: Dogtown Surplus Store
description: Military surplus clothing in the heart of Dogtown.
tips: Combat-oriented clothing with high armor values.

name: Charter Hill Arms
description: Upscale weapons dealer in Charter Hill.
tips: Luxury weapons for the wealthy clientele of Westbrook.

name: Coastview Clothing
description: Clothing vendor on the Coastview boardwalk.
tips: Beach and casual wear. Limited but unique selection.

name: Northside Industrial Wear
description: Industrial workwear and Maelstrom-inspired fashion.
tips: Rugged clothing with practical armor values.

name: Dogtown Street Battle
description: NCPD scanner — armed conflict in the streets of Dogtown.
tips: Barghest soldiers engaged. Bring your best gear.

name: Dogtown Smuggling Ring
description: NCPD scanner — organized smuggling operation in Dogtown.
tips: Hansen's men running contraband. Heavy resistance expected.

name: Desert Dumping Ground
description: NCPD scanner — bodies found dumped in the Badlands desert.
tips: Isolated location. Watch for Wraith patrols nearby.

name: Hidden Stash - Desert Cache
description: NCPD scanner — hidden supply cache in the Badlands.
tips: Buried near a rock formation. Contains rare components.
